## CryptoUtils.KeyStoreConverters.isKeyStoreFile() function

Checks if a JSON object appears to be a key store file. Uses the format field as a discriminator.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function isKeyStoreFile(json: unknown): boolean;
```
